item.name: config
item.item: To manage a locations: 1) Open the Netsuite system https://system.netsuite.com. 2) Go to Setup > Company > Classifications > Locations > New

item.name: config
item.item: To manage a folders: 1) Open the Netsuite system https://system.netsuite.com. 2) Go to Documents > Files > File Cabinet

item.name: config
item.item: To manage a currencies: 1) Open the Netsuite system https://system.netsuite.com. 2) Go to Financial > Lists > Currencies

item.name: config
item.item: To manage a Tax Schedule: 1) Open the Netsuite system https://system.netsuite.com. 2) Go to Financial > Lists > Tax Schedules

item.name: config
item.item: To manage a Tax Codes: 1) Open the Netsuite system https://system.netsuite.com. 2) Go to Setup > Accounting > Tax Codes

item.name: config
item.item: To manage a Subsidiary: 1) Open the Netsuite system https://system.netsuite.com. 2) Go to Setup > Other Setup > Subsidiaries

item.name: config
item.item: Netsuite Customers Sales Rep Internal Id
To manage a Employees 1) Open the Netsuite system https://system.netsuite.com. 2) Go to Lists > Employees

item.name: config
item.item: To manage a Customer Categories 1) Open the Netsuite system https://system.netsuite.com. 2) Go to Setup > Accounting > Accounting Lists

item.name: config
item.item: To manage a Customer Terms 1) Open the Netsuite system https://system.netsuite.com. 2) Go to Setup > Accounting > Accounting Lists

item.name: config
item.item: Default Netsuite Customers Price Level Internal Id
To manage a Customer Price Levels 1) Open the Netsuite system https://system.netsuite.com. 2) Go to Setup > Accounting > Accounting Lists

item.name: config
item.item: Default Netsuite Customers Lead Source Internal Id

To manage a Customer Lead Source if you have enabled the Marketing Automation feature 1) Open the Netsuite system https://system.netsuite.com. 2) Go to List > Marketing > Marketing Campaigns. If you do not use the Marketing Automation feature, you can create new leads sources at Setup > Sales > CRM Lists > New > Lead Source.

item.name: config
item.item: Export the customer company attribute to Netsuite

item.name: config
item.item: To manage a Departments 1) Open the Netsuite system https://system.netsuite.com. 2) Go to Setup > Company > Classifications > Departments

item.name: config
item.item: To manage a Locations: 1) Open the Netsuite system https://system.netsuite.com. 2) Go to Setup > Company > Classifications > Locations

item.name: config
item.item: Default Netsuite Order Shipping Item Internal Id
To manage a Shipping Items: 1) Open the Netsuite system https://system.netsuite.com. 2) Go to Lists > Accounting > Shipping Items

item.name: config
item.item: Make sure you exported attributes from Magento to Netsuite before importing Configurable Products

item.name: config
item.item: Export Bundle Products as Grouped Products
Bundle products will be exported as Grouped Products

item.name: config
item.item: Generate a Customer Deposite for an order

item.name: config
item.item: Use order increment id instead of PO number

item.name: config
item.item: Enable matrix option for custom item fields with a List

item.name: config
item.item: Automatically apply credit to the oldest open receivable

item.name: config
item.item: To manage a Funds: 1) Open the Netsuite system https://system.netsuite.com. 2) Go to Setup > Company > Classifications > Funds

item.name: config
item.item: Enter the Internal IDs of the price levels separated by commas

item.name: config
item.item: Set First Name + Last Name as The Customer Entity Id

item.name: config
item.item: Use the HTTP 1.0 protocol version option for the SOAP request
